name: myhr-attendance-p2
description: Pi PM assigns myHR attendance P2 bugs to Pi Software for fix via spec->plan->build->validate.

steps.message: Read pipeline/REQUEST.md and assign the myHR attendance P2 fix task to pi-software with a Sabbk-compliant handoff. The task: fix 6 P2 attendance bugs (ATT-010 through ATT-015) in the myHR Laravel+Vue system.
Read your INBOX-handoff.md and TASK.md. Execute the assigned fixes through the standard pipeline.
